hardness_axes.name: Discover
hardness_axes.reasoning: Solver must infer inode-witness allowlist matching, sysroot bind ordering, registry stub shard selection, capture purge timing, and journal replay cursor from partial Python modules, fixture layouts, and phased CLI behavior—not from instruction.md alone.

hardness_axes.name: Synthesize
hardness_axes.reasoning: Correct audit replay requires coordinating input filter, header isolation, offline registry stub, output capture, ELF-to-JSON digest bridge, durable phase journal, and false-green health probes across four opaque module roots.

hardness_axes.name: Diagnose or Design/Search
hardness_axes.reasoning: Constrained-build design search: public contract states every phase outcome but not which subsystem mis-orders binds, selects stub shards, or commits capture before journal convergence.

hardness_axes.name: Navigate coupling
hardness_axes.reasoning: Local fixes to allowlist logic break sysroot isolation tests; stub-only fixes pass fetch rows but fail ELF cross-check; premature health gauge green masks incomplete journal replay.

hardness_axes.name: Reason beyond training
hardness_axes.reasoning: Hermetic build sandbox contracts (allowlist+sysroot+offline registry+capture manifest+audit digest replay) require build/CI failure-recovery reasoning beyond generic Dockerfile or pip-install recipes.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Disclosure-collapse
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: After contract_rules.md discloses schemas, mirror pairs, and digest formula home, solver still must discover inode witness matching, bind order, stub shard key, purge-after-commit ordering, and journal replay sequencing from code—post-disclosure work is coupled design search, not 1:1 rule transcription.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Hidden-instance
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Hardness is cross-subsystem coordination across drill profiles and platform matrix rows, not guessing which single file among hundreds is broken.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Single-artifact repair
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Flipping-point contract requires four distinct module roots; one manifest or allowlist JSON edit cannot satisfy ablation and convergence suites.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Generalization
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Verifier exercises multiple drill profiles in drill_profiles.toml and platform matrix variants; fix must generalize across rollback and replay permutations.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Prompt-honesty
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Honest design-brief names obligations and artifacts without naming fn_r7/fn_n3/fn_w8/fn_t2 or the mis-ordered phase wiring; collapse does not occur from prompt honesty.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Cheating-vs-difficulty
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Anti-cheating (offline-only, no manual JSON, pipeline rerun traps) supports fairness; legitimate difficulty remains in multi-phase coupling.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Mechanical-fix filter
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Task weakness is not verifier deps or reward footer formatting; core challenge is hermetic wrapper design coordination.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Localized-fix
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: No single obvious helper cluster satisfies mirror-pair ELF cross-check plus rollback convergence; four-root flipping contract blocks localization.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Oracle-locality
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Oracle coordinates substantive edits across r7k, n3p, w8q, t2m modules plus driver wiring— not one-file wholesale replace.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Small declarative-cluster
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Solve is not one config block or manifest table; requires procedural phase orchestration and cross-format digest materialization.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Grep-collapse
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Instruction nouns (hermetic, sandbox, allowlist, sysroot) are banned from fix-path symbols; opaque fn_r7/fn_n3/fn_w8/fn_t2 prevent noun grep to patch site.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Pre-factored-helper
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Decoy helpers (path_help, mount_help, cache_help, hash_help) perform adjacent work; prompt bullets do not map 1:1 onto fix-path function names.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Recipe-discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Standard hermetic-build textbook recipe is discounted; residual hardness is authority splits, false-green health, and journal replay ordering under coupled phases.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Security-aura discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Sandbox/isolation nouns do not substitute for engineering work; verifier checks behavioral digests and convergence, not security checklist completion.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Orthogonal-checklist
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Phase outcomes trade off: early capture purge breaks rollback; wrong stub shard breaks fetch but also poisons attest rows; coupled insight clusters not independent bullets.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Harness-discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Docker offline harness is realism; difficulty comes from wrapper logic and cross-artifact invariants, not container complexity alone.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: One-pass solvability
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Frontier model cannot one-pass implement from instruction; must run phased driver, inspect journal/state, and ablate four modules to learn ordering constraints.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Hard-only gate
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Coupled hermetic sandbox design with rollback recovery and cross-format attest is hard-tier, not medium respectability.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Discovery/design budget test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Five non-trivial discoveries enumerated in discovery_budget with planned locations; each forces codebase engagement beyond instruction.md.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Instruction specificity test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Non-repair constrained_build uses design-brief framing: complete public target and constraints without solution-complete algorithms or patch coordinates.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Topology distribution test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Three distinct implementation topologies enumerated, each requiring ≥3 coordinated components with no single-location sufficiency.

rubric_axes.name: Verifiable
rubric_axes.reasoning: Deterministic offline pytest derives verdicts from regenerated audit_report.json, trace digests, ELF section hashes, and ablation flips.

rubric_axes.name: Well-specified
rubric_axes.reasoning: contract_rules.md, hook_cmds.txt, and pilot header define row/summary schema, mirror pairs, and digest reduction; two drafters produce equivalent verifiers.

rubric_axes.name: Solvable
rubric_axes.reasoning: Expert build/CI engineer can complete hermetic wrapper in hours offline knowing phased sandbox patterns; solution well under 100k LOC.

rubric_axes.name: Difficult
rubric_axes.reasoning: Requires professional build-system and reproducible-build experience; undergrad scaffold completion insufficient without cross-phase diagnosis.

rubric_axes.name: Interesting
rubric_axes.reasoning: Hermetic sandbox audit replay is paid production work in supply-chain and reproducible-build pipelines.

rubric_axes.name: Outcome-verified
rubric_axes.reasoning: Tests grade regenerated artifacts and convergence; they do not mandate a single toolchain brand or patch recipe.

instruction_completeness_test.reasoning: Instruction.md states public contract and phase obligations but not inode witness rules, bind order, stub shard selection, purge timing, or journal replay cursor—solver must engage codebase, fixtures, and phased driver output.

discovery_budget.discovery: Allowlist enforcement matches inode witness tuples from allowlist.json, not naive path-prefix strings; prefix-only filter passes local health but fails cross-mount drill rows.
discovery_budget.planned_location: environment/r7k/filter_mux.py with witness material in environment/r7k/witness_scan.py and environment/data/allowlist.json
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Revealing inode-vs-path rule collapses design search to editing one obvious string compare; instruction stays at allowlisted-inputs outcome level.

discovery_budget.discovery: Sysroot header isolation requires bind overlay before compiler environment export; reversing order leaks host includes via CXXFLAGS while health subcommand still reports ready.
discovery_budget.planned_location: environment/n3p/root_mux.py coordinated with environment/engine/pipeline.py phase scheduling
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Naming bind-before-export ordering is a construction recipe; public contract only requires host headers hidden except declared sysroot.

discovery_budget.discovery: Offline registry stub selects fixture shard by phase ordinal XOR digest prefix from phase journal, not lexicographically first fixture file.
discovery_budget.planned_location: environment/w8q/stub_mux.py with shard table in environment/w8q/shard_index.py and fixtures under environment/data/registry_fixtures/
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Disclosing shard key formula turns fetch phase into transcription; instruction only states pinned fixture responses without live network.

discovery_budget.discovery: Output capture purges undeclared artifacts only after durable journal commit; early purge yields false-green intermediate manifest rows that diverge from ELF attest cross-check.
discovery_budget.planned_location: environment/t2m/cap_mux.py with commit gate in environment/engine/phase_journal.py
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Premature-purge timing is an implementation secret; instruction requires only declared artifacts in final capture with deterministic digests.

discovery_budget.discovery: Rollback drills replay phase cursor from durable journal segments; rebuilding health gauge without journal reconstruction passes status subcommand but fails terminal convergence tests.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Journal replay sequence is the hidden coordination burden; instruction names rollback recovery outcome, not cursor reconstruction recipe.

instruction_specificity.reasoning: Constrained_build task discloses phase obligations, artifact paths, schemas, mirror pairs, and digest formula home while withholding module-level construction route and mis-ordered wiring details.

attack_path.summary: Agent patches only allowlist path checks and writes audit_report.json manually after one green hs_run status call.
attack_path.reasoning: test_p10_rerun_pipe reruns cmake+hs_run; test_p19_premature fails health-green with disagreeing mirror pairs; test_p17_flip_t2 breaks ELF cross-check; ablation flips on fn_r7/fn_n3/fn_w8/fn_t2 block single-module shortcuts.

smallest_plausible_patch.summary: Coordinate inode-witness allowlist in fn_r7, bind-before-export in fn_n3, journal-keyed stub shard in fn_w8, post-commit purge plus ELF attest bridge in fn_t2, and pipeline phase ordering—none alone passes majority tests.
smallest_plausible_patch.reasoning: Category one-shot collapse modes (one dep bump, one manifest row, delete cache) do not satisfy build_dependency_toolchain bar; flipping-point contract enforces four-root spread.

collapse_audit.reasoning: Existing 25+ file scaffold with partial wrapper, formal contract_rules.md, and multi-phase driver prevents blank-canvas transcription. Post-disclosure residual work is discovering phase authority splits and cross-format ties, not mapping each bullet to one obvious function.
collapse_audit.residual_hardness: Solver must reconcile input witness matching, sysroot bind order, offline stub shard selection, capture purge timing, journal replay cursor, and JSON-to-ELF digest invariants under rollback drills while deceptive health/status surfaces report local success.
red_flags: Seed collapse_risk blank-canvas mitigated by committed partial codebase and four-root flipping contract
hidden_contract_risk medium—cross-artifact invariants live in behavior; contract_rules.md names outcomes not wiring

topology_enumeration.summary: Input isolation topology: inode allowlist + sysroot overlay + pipeline phase gate + journal cursor
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Filter without correct bind order still leaks host headers; root_mux alone cannot admit only allowlisted inputs; pipeline ordering without journal loses rollback convergence.

topology_enumeration.summary: Fetch and capture topology: stub shard selection + capture purge ring + registry fixtures + ELF attest materialization
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Stub returns metadata but wrong shard breaks downstream rows; capture without ELF cross-check passes JSON shape; fixtures alone do not enforce selection logic.

topology_enumeration.summary: Rollback convergence topology: health gauge + phase journal replay + audit report reduction + drill profile permutations
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Health green before journal replay is false-green; pilot reduction without journal data yields wrong run_digest; drills expose ordering bugs invisible in single happy path.

symbol_table.signature: fn_r7(witness_tbl: dict, mount_set: set) -> tuple[int, bytes]
symbol_table.purpose: Fold allowlist witness tuples against observed mount inode set

symbol_table.signature: fn_n3(sys_tbl: dict, env_map: dict) -> tuple[int, list]
symbol_table.purpose: Apply sysroot overlay binds before exporting compiler search paths

symbol_table.signature: fn_w8(phase_tag: int, seed_hex: str, shard_tbl: dict) -> dict
symbol_table.purpose: Select offline registry fixture shard for fetch phase

symbol_table.signature: fn_t2(manifest_tbl: dict, blob_paths: list, journal_ok: bool) -> tuple[int, dict]
symbol_table.purpose: Purge undeclared outputs after journal commit and attach ELF section digests

decoy_manifest.non_fix_purpose: Normalizes relative path strings for logging without inode witness enforcement
Lists existing mount points for diagnostics without sysroot overlay ordering
Reads newest fixture file mtime for cache warming unrelated to shard selection
Hashes stdout logs for operator diagnostics without ELF section materialization

renames_during_drafting.reason: Instruction noun allowlisted would grep-collapse to obvious fix symbol
Instruction nouns sysroot and overlay banned from fix-path identifiers
Instruction nouns registry and fixture collide with planned helper stems
Instruction nouns capture, manifest, and purge must not appear on fix path

difficulty_mechanism_plan.placement: environment/engine/pipeline.py multi-phase CLI workflow across input/isolate/fetch/capture/attest
difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: Models stop after first green status subcommand without finishing attest and convergence phases logged in journal
difficulty_mechanism_plan.fairness_guardrail: contract_rules.md lists phase outcomes; hook_cmds documents required argv sequence; each phase appends trace rows

difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: Models trust misleading local ready/steady labels while durable journal and mirror pairs still disagree
difficulty_mechanism_plan.fairness_guardrail: Verifier cross-checks health output against journal segments and echo pair facet_hex equality

difficulty_mechanism_plan.placement: environment/t2m/purge_ring.py intermediate manifest rows before journal commit
difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: Models declare capture done when manifest shape looks complete but ELF attest cross-check still fails
difficulty_mechanism_plan.fairness_guardrail: test_p19_premature requires terminal convergence with matching run_digest after full pipeline

difficulty_mechanism_plan.placement: environment/t2m/cap_mux.py JSON rows tied to sample_proj ELF section hashes and registry fixture bytes
difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: Models fix JSON emitters without reconciling binary section digests and fixture shard metadata
difficulty_mechanism_plan.fairness_guardrail: Instruction names cross-format attest obligation; tests recompute digests from visible formula home

difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: Models skip journal cursor reconstruction after partial phase failure, passing happy path only
difficulty_mechanism_plan.fairness_guardrail: Drill profiles are named in instruction; verifier reruns rollback sequences deterministically offline

calibration_plan.human_sanity: Expert build engineer reproduces incoherent audit_report under stock scaffold, applies coordinated four-module fix, reruns hs_run offline to steady convergence
calibration_plan.shortcut_audit: Block hardcoded audit_report.json, test edits, stale-doc-only changes, wrapper-only health subcommand patches, and single-manifest-row tweaks
calibration_plan.ablation_plan: Remove deceptive health layer, then journal replay, then stub shard selection, then bind ordering—each ablation should drop pass rate materially

pass_rate_target.basis: Aligns with Part E Hard/Medium/Easy thresholds on worst-model accuracy; verifier-offline: pytest and cmake baked in Dockerfile with tests/test.sh using no runtime apt/pip/curl; post-upload difficulty classification runs only after successful agent+verifier cycles per PLATFORM_AUTO_EVAL.md

metrics.criterion: Regenerated audit_report rows match coherent mirror-pair and rc predicates after full hs_run pipeline
ELF section digests, journal replay cursor, and stub shard bytes align with JSON rows under drill permutations
No undeclared capture paths, no host header leakage artifacts, durable journal segments consistent across reruns
hook_cmds argv sequences and hs_run phase interfaces match contract_rules.md
audit_report.json, run_traces/, and refreshed state/ emitted with required schema fields

verifier_scoring_plan.binary_threshold_rule: reward 1 only when all weighted metrics pass; any ablation flip or pipeline trap failure yields 0

subtype_milestone_plan.sidecar_or_protocol_notes: single-container local verifier only; offline registry fixtures and drill profiles pre-bundled under environment/data/

platform_files.role: metadata; must set [environment] allow_internet = false and category = software-engineering
domain verifier with ablation and pipeline traps
pinned offline image with cmake, python3, pytest, tmux, asciinema
local authoring artifact mirroring construction manifest

task_files.role: oracle frontier A — inode witness allowlist fold
oracle frontier B — sysroot overlay bind ordering
oracle frontier C — offline registry shard selection
oracle frontier D — post-commit capture and ELF attest bridge
hs_run driver entry and summary reduction header
durable phase cursor and rollback segments
small offline C++ sample under hermetic wrap
sample compile target producing attestable ELF
operator argv patterns for hs_run hooks

fix_frontier.distribution: environment/r7k/filter_mux.py, environment/n3p/root_mux.py, environment/w8q/stub_mux.py, environment/t2m/cap_mux.py across four opaque roots
fix_frontier.naming_policy: Opaque fn_r7/fn_n3/fn_w8/fn_t2 on neutral parameter names; no instruction nouns on fix path
fix_frontier.helpers_policy: Decoys perform credible adjacent diagnostics; frontier stays thin at four symbols with pipeline/journal orchestration separate

forbidden_assertion_styles: readiness fields named *_ok in instruction prose tied 1:1 to fix-path grep

task_shape.collapse_risk: blank-canvas build with no binding cross-component constraints

category_profile.allowed_instruction_disclosures: Build/test commands, artifact identities, platform matrix, reproducibility outputs, phased driver obligations, audit_report schema, mirror pairs, hook_cmds argv, contract_rules formal properties
category_profile.forbidden_instruction_leaks: Resolver bug site, cache path, generated-file source, exact package edge, inode-vs-path rule, bind order recipe, stub shard key, journal replay sequence, patch functions
category_profile.category_specific_hardness_bar: Lockfiles/fixtures, generated capture manifest, build graph phases, platform matrix, and cache/journal invalidation must coordinate; one version bump or one manifest row cannot pass ablation and drill suites
category_profile.category_specific_verifier_risks: Pin-one-dep fix, network reliance, clean-build-only tests, false-green health/status without durable journal convergence
category_profile.coverage_role: Strengthens build_dependency_toolchain coverage via hermetic sandbox build contract constrained-build topology

satisfiability_risk.rc2_planned_name_risk: low — opaque r7k/n3p/w8q/t2m roots and fn_* symbols committed in construction manifest
satisfiability_risk.gx9_contract_risk: low — tests derive verdicts from run_digest recompute, pair equality, and ELF cross-checks, not per-row answer tables in instruction
satisfiability_risk.cr1_symbol_frontier_risk: low — four substantive Python modules plus explicit flipping-point contract
satisfiability_risk.hidden_contract_risk: medium — cross-artifact invariants (journal vs capture vs ELF) live in behavior; contract_rules.md names outcomes not wiring

actionability_plan.verifier_command_visible: CMake build from /app/environment, /app/bin/hs_run driver, hook_cmds.txt argv sequences
actionability_plan.source_fix_intent_visible: yes — complete wrapper under /app/environment without naming modules
actionability_plan.generated_output_rule_visible: /app/output/audit_report.json path, mirror pair rules, regeneration requirement, run_traces directory
actionability_plan.exact_formula_home: module comment above environment/pilot/entry.py for run_digest and band_span reduction

waiver_plan.waiver_rationale: Hardness from coupled phased behavior and cross-format invariants, not harness brittleness; offline fixtures and deterministic replays avoid waiver pressure

reference_pattern.justification_if_none: No promoted reference in docs/reference_tasks/index.json matches hermetic sandbox phased-wrapper constrained_build with Python multi-root flipping-point discipline; closest abi-rebuild-mismatch covers multi-crate regeneration not offline registry stub plus capture attest bridge

realism_source.upstream_or_synthetic_rationale: Minimized from Bazel/BuildKit hermetic action sandbox and reproducible-build audit replay postmortems where allowlisted inputs, sysroot isolation, offline registry mirrors, and capture manifests must align for deterministic digests
realism_source.minimization_preserves: Causal coupling across input allowlist, header isolation, offline fetch stub, capture manifest, journal rollback, and JSON-to-ELF attest cross-check
